queries.exists: SELECT 1 FROM programs WHERE name LIKE 'Burp Suite Community Edition %' AND publisher = 'PortSwigger Web Security';
queries.patched: SELECT 1 WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM programs WHERE name LIKE 'Burp Suite Community Edition %' AND publisher = 'PortSwigger Web Security' AND version_compare(version, '2026.3.3') < 0);
